title: Pleurostachys beyrichii
taxonomy: Pleurostachys beyrichii is classified as a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This plant is native to South America and is a member of the genus Pleurostachys. The classification of Pleurostachys beyrichii is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Liliophyta, class Liliopsida, and order Poales. Within the family Cyperaceae, Pleurostachys beyrichii is placed in the tribe Cyperaeae. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of this species.
